唔係

Hey NosPlayers,

On Monday we will have a scheduled maintenance.

When exactly? Monday September 18th 2017 from 09:00h to approximately 14:00h CEST. Both the game servers and the website will be unavailable during that time.
What will be changed?

- Preparations for the Steam release: We plan on releasing NosTale on Steam on Monday, September 18th! From then on you can choose if you want to play via this gaming platform or if you prefer to continue playing via standalone clients. Read the following FAQ for more information about NosTale on Steam.
- Start of the following new servers (for all players, regardless of whether they play via Steam or not): Fernon (DE5, new German server), Celestis (FR5, new French server), Boreas (ES4, new Spanish server), Ellion (IT4, new Italian server), Gryf (PL4, new Polish server), Erenia (new Russian server), Cylloan (new US server in the English community).

Hey NosPlayers,

On Monday we will have a scheduled maintenance.

When exactly? Monday September 18th 2017 from 09:00h to approximately 14:00h CEST. Both the game servers and the website will be unavailable during that time.
What will be changed?

- Preparations for the Steam release: We plan on releasing NosTale on Steam on Monday, September 18th! From then on you can choose if you want to play via this gaming platform or if you prefer to continue playing via standalone clients. Read the following FAQ for more information about NosTale on Steam.
- Start of the following new servers (for all players, regardless of whether they play via Steam or not): Fernon (DE5, new German server), Celestis (FR5, new French server), Boreas (ES4, new Spanish server), Ellion (IT4, new Italian server), Gryf (PL4, new Polish server), Erenia (new Russian server), Cylloan (new US server in the English community).
